title_working: Pure Waste — The Last Dive of the Titan

R2 — recent disaster, named deceased victims + living relatives. PRE-PUBLISH FACT RE-CHECK REQUIRED (rights_status=conditional): verify USCG report wording, MTS exhibit URL, exact Rush-quote source.
